items.title: Microsoft warns users of 'Crypto Clipper' malware spread via USB drives
items.summary: The malware blends data theft with remote code execution, “turning a financially motivated stealer into a lightweight backdoor,” Microsoft said.

items.title: Aster popped over 10% on radical 'buyback and burn' upgrade. But gains were short-lived
items.summary: ASTER sees two-way volatility as bullish protocol-specific news meets hawkish Fed.

items.title: Approval Phishing: From Just One Case to Full-Scale Disruption
items.summary: Chain of Thought is our new expert-hosted webinar series, taking you behind the scenes of real investigations, emerging typologies and… The post Approval Phishing: From Just One Case to Full-Scale Disruption appeared first on Chainalysis.

items.title: Smart-contract and DeFi coins lead losses as bitcoin wilts for 4th straight day
items.summary: Concerns about STRC, the dividend-paying preferred stock from Strategy continue to dominate market sentiment.

items.title: Bitcoin falls below $63,000 as risk assets sell off and the week's bounce fades
items.summary: Crypto dropped across the board on Friday in holiday-thinned trading, giving back the week's gains. With oil down 9% and the Iran deal signed, the question turns to whether this cycle gets an altseason at all.

items.title: $13B Bitcoin options expiry looms: Will bulls endure more pain in June?
items.summary: Bitcoin bears hold the upper hand in the upcoming Bitcoin options expiry, a potentially early warning that more BTC downside could unfold.

items.title: Aave survived $8.45B in withdrawals, but risk questions remain
items.summary: Aave handled $8.45 billion in withdrawals without freezing funds, but the episode raised fresh questions about hidden risks in DeFi lending.

items.title: Ethereum faces core development funding crisis, former contributor warns
items.summary: The warning comes as the Ethereum Foundation reduces spending, adjusts its treasury strategy and undergoes a wave of leadership departures.

items.title: Ireland mulls crypto safeguards in response to financial risks
items.summary: For the first time in seven years, the Irish government released an assessment related to digital assets, noting risks from money laundering, terrorism financing, sanctions violations and bribery.

items.title: Philippine SEC signals readiness for RWA tokenization
items.summary: Philippine SEC Commissioner Rogelio Quevedo told Cointelegraph that tokenized assets could give Filipinos more legitimate investment options while helping steer them away from scams.

items.title: Crypto kidnappers who robbed a Minnesota family of $8M plead guilty
items.summary: Two Texas brothers admitted to holding a Minnesota family at gunpoint and forcing the transfer of $8 million in cryptocurrency.

items.title: S token drops 5% as 3 former execs resign from Sonic Labs board
items.summary: Andre Cronje, Michael Kong and David Richardson stepped down from the Sonic Labs board on Friday, while Matt Visser has been appointed as CEO, replacing Mitchell Demeter who resigned in February.

items.title: Schwab to join prediction markets race with S&P 500 event-based options: WSJ
items.summary: The planned offering would let customers bet on index moves as Coinbase and Robinhood expand in the sector.

items.title: GoMining challenges Jack Dorsey's Square with payments system designed around bitcoin
items.summary: GoMining unveiled a software development kit and programmable access for its bitcoin payment protocol GoBTC Pay, allowing merchants to accept BTC for everyday purchases.

items.title: Franklin Templeton proposes new ETFs that turn corporate dividends into bitcoin
items.summary: Your day-ahead look for June 19, 2026

items.title: Digital credit market hit by huge selloff as Strive CEO blames leverage liquidations
items.summary: Matt Cole says forced selling from leveraged investors pushed STRC and SATA sharply lower before both rebounded.

items.title: Microsoft found malware that hijacks crypto wallets and spreads through USB sticks
items.summary: The software intercepts shortcut files and directs them to install a worm that harvests private keys from the Windows clipboard and inserts its own destination wallet addresses when it detects a transfer.

items.title: XRP falls 3% after losing $1.15 support as breakout attempt fades
items.summary: Heavy selling pushed XRP back below a key support zone, reinforcing a downtrend that has repeatedly stalled rallies near $1.25.

items.title: Live markets: Bitcoin under pressure as Saylor comments on STRC selloff
items.summary: About 20% of miners are now unprofitable, and publicly traded miners sold more than 32,000 bitcoin in the first quarter to cover operating costs, more than they offloaded in all of 2025.

items.title: Bitcoin traders load up on bearish bets all the way down to $52,000
items.summary: Bitcoin traders are scrambling to buy options bets that would pay off if the selloff deepens.
